headline: Constellation Brands to Report Full Fiscal Year and Fourth Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 8, 2026 After Market Close and Host Conference Call on April 9, 2026 at 8:00 AM ET
summary: ROCHESTER, N.Y., March 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ), a leading beverage alcohol company, announced today it will report financial results for its full fiscal year and fourth quarter ended February 28, 2026, on Wednesday, April 8, 2026, after the close of the U.S. markets by posting the earnings release and financial tables, as well as other supporting materials, on the company’s investor relations website at ir.cbrands.com.
